ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Continued To Apr-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Personal Representative.

Ms. Vann stated that he filed a status report which is set for March 19, 2019, that the inventory and appraisal hasn't come back yet and that he is not sure what the hold up is. Status on close of estate is continued to March 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it does not have an inventory and appraisal, or a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Vann apologized stating that it fell through the cracks, that the only asset in the estate is a 50% interest in a real property and that he can get the inventory out to Mr. Mahoney (Probate Referee) by the end of this week. Status on close of estate is continued to January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
